description: Static all-zero F1 home standing reference using the model default root height.
joint_pose: all 29 dof positions are zero radians
velocities: root and dof velocities are zero
notes: Use this for first-stage clean standing warm-up in Isaac Gym.
The earlier f1_zero_static_stand_bodypos.npz lowers root_z for MuJoCo physical foot contact; this home variant keeps init_state.pos z=0.7.
